notes: Cataloged from lyrics provided in meeting. Song structure: Intro → Verse 1 → Verse 2 → Outro. Heavy theme of duality (D4RK SIDE), raw vulnerability about mental health, addiction, and the music industry. References to Nyjah Huston, Kylo Ren. Friends lost to cocaine/fentanyl pipeline mentioned in Verse 2. Extended outro mirrors intro with darker resolution.
